Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The current model has 1 create req approve req sequence correct 2 Then a parallel block containing create po receive goods receive invoice match invoice pay invoice 3 Then close case sequence correct

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The parallel AND block allows any permutation of these five activities create po receive goods receive invoice match invoice pay invoice

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In the real domain this should follow a strict sequence 1 Create Purchase Order must come first you need a PO before anything else 2 Then in parallel you can receive goods and receive invoice these can happen in any order relative to each other goods might arrive before invoice or invoice might arrive before goods 3 Match Invoice to PO must happen after both goods and invoice are received 4 Pay Invoice must happen after matching

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So the proper structure should be create req approve req create po parallel receive goods and receive invoice match invoice pay invoice close case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This makes the most sense from a business perspective A PO must exist before goods can be received or an invoice can be matched Goods and invoice can arrive independently and in either order The invoice can only be matched to a PO after both the goods and invoice have been received Payment can only be made after the invoice has been matched

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Proposed fixed model from pm4py objects process tree obj import Operator ProcessTree Define activities create req ProcessTree label Create Purchase Requisition approve req ProcessTree label Approve Purchase Requisition create po ProcessTree label Create Purchase Order receive goods ProcessTree label Receive Goods receive invoice ProcessTree label Receive Invoice match invoice ProcessTree label Match Invoice to PO pay invoice ProcessTree label Pay Invoice close case ProcessTree label Close Case Parallel block receive goods and invoice can occur in any order receive block ProcessTree operator Operator PARALLEL children receive goods receive invoice Full sequence root ProcessTree operator Operator SEQUENCE children create req approve req create po receive block match invoice pay invoice close case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The fixed model enforces 1 Purchase requisition must be created and approved first sequence 2 Purchase order can only be created after requisition is approved sequence 3 After PO is created goods and invoice can be received in any order parallel 4 Invoice matching can only happen after BOTH goods and invoice are received sequence after parallel 5 Payment can only be made after the invoice is matched sequence 6 Case can only be closed after payment

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This prevents unwanted behavior such as Paying the invoice before receiving goods Paying the invoice before matching Matching the invoice before receiving goods Creating a PO without an approved requisition Closing the case before payment
